content:
graph TD
    IF[Intermittent Fasting]
    IF --> TRE[Time-Restricted Eating]
    IF --> FIVETWO[5:2 Modified Fasting]
    IF --> ADF[Alternate-Day Fasting]
    IF --> PF[Periodic/Prolonged Fasting]
    TRE --> TRE168[16:8 Schedule]
    TRE --> TRE1410[14:10 Schedule]
    TRE --> TRE_WIN[Eating Window 4-12h]
    FIVETWO --> FT_DAYS[5 Habitual Days]
    FIVETWO --> FT_RESTRICT[2 Non-Consecutive Restricted Days]
    FT_RESTRICT --> FT_KCAL[500-600 kcal]
    ADF --> ADF_FAST[Fast Day: Eliminated or Reduced Intake]
    ADF --> ADF_FEED[Feed Day: No Explicit Restriction]
    PF --> PF_DUR[Duration 24h or Longer]
    PF --> FMD[Fasting-Mimicking Diet]
    IF --> SHARED[Shared Physiological Premise]
    SHARED --> NEG[Negative Energy Balance]
    SHARED --> GLY[Glycogen Depletion]
    SHARED --> HORM[Altered Hormonal Signaling]
    IF --> DIFFER[Differ In]
    DIFFER --> DUR[Duration]
    DIFFER --> FREQ[Frequency]
    DIFFER --> SEV[Severity]
    DIFFER --> TOL[Tolerability & Adherence]
